items.title: S01E01 - Mr Pershore and Ken Grist
items.summary: Young and ambitious Richard Pershore has a weakness for a pretty face. He knows what he wants – a job with the Organization. He also knows that the Organization is a jungle. If he gets what he wants, is he ruthless enough to survive?

infolabels.title: Mr Pershore and Ken Grist
infolabels.plot: Young and ambitious Richard Pershore has a weakness for a pretty face. He knows what he wants – a job with the Organization. He also knows that the Organization is a jungle. If he gets what he wants, is he ruthless enough to survive?

items.title: S01E02 - Ken Grist and Eve
items.summary: Ken Grist has been fired, but he refuses to admit the fact to his wife, to his colleagues, and even to himself. His ex-boss David Pulman has no intention of dealing with the situation, so Ken decides to delegate – with the result that PR become very personal relations.

infolabels.title: Ken Grist and Eve
infolabels.plot: Ken Grist has been fired, but he refuses to admit the fact to his wife, to his colleagues, and even to himself. His ex-boss David Pulman has no intention of dealing with the situation, so Ken decides to delegate – with the result that PR become very personal relations.

items.title: S01E03 - Eve and Rodney Spurling
items.summary: Everyone at the Organization knows that press officer Rodney Spurling is the Chairman's whipping boy. It has always seemed to be the natural state of affairs. So why have Eve and Pulman taken an interest in Rodney's welfare?

infolabels.title: Eve and Rodney Spurling
infolabels.plot: Everyone at the Organization knows that press officer Rodney Spurling is the Chairman's whipping boy. It has always seemed to be the natural state of affairs. So why have Eve and Pulman taken an interest in Rodney's welfare?

items.title: S01E04 - Rodney Spurling and Peter Frame
items.summary: The PR staff anxiously await the arrival of a consultant psychiatrist.

infolabels.title: Rodney Spurling and Peter Frame
infolabels.plot: The PR staff anxiously await the arrival of a consultant psychiatrist.

items.title: S01E05 - Peter Frame and Veronica
items.summary: Frame has an idea. Pulman's secretary, Veronica, has a better idea of her own. So the members of the PR department find themselves playing professional musical chairs. But who wins?

infolabels.title: Peter Frame and Veronica
infolabels.plot: Frame has an idea. Pulman's secretary, Veronica, has a better idea of her own. So the members of the PR department find themselves playing professional musical chairs. But who wins?

items.title: S01E06 - Veronica and Mr Pulman
items.summary: Pulman and his staff find themselves playing a new version of the Truth Game.

infolabels.title: Veronica and Mr Pulman
infolabels.plot: Pulman and his staff find themselves playing a new version of the Truth Game.

items.title: S01E07 - Mr Pulman and Mr Pershore
items.summary: Pershore thinks that where his own future is concerned, he knows best. His colleagues think they know even better. And when Pulman takes an interest, what will happen to Pershore is anyone's guess.
